description: The remote host is running a version of Windows that is no longer supported and does not receive security updates.
solution: Upgrade to a supported version of Windows Server.

description: The remote host supports SMBv1, an outdated and insecure protocol vulnerable to several known exploits including EternalBlue.
solution: Disable SMBv1 support and require SMBv2 or higher.

description: The remote RDP service allows weak encryption methods to be negotiated, exposing sessions to downgrade attacks.
solution: Enforce TLS 1.2 or higher and disable legacy encryption negotiation.

description: It is possible to obtain the banner of the remote web server, which discloses version information.
solution: Configure the web server to suppress the Server header.
